title: bsw.zone_state/1
description: Consolidated per-zone severity published by the fusion engine on bsw/zone/{zone_id} (retained). This is the HMI's input.
$comment: No ts_kind here (unlike the up-bound wire messages): the sole producer is the fusion engine on the RTC-backed Pi, so ts is always epoch_ms. The HMI ages liveness from local receipt time anyway (ADR-0008), never from this ts.

stale.description: true when contributing sensors went silent (with severity=UNKNOWN)

standby.description: park-standby (05 §5.4): visuals kept, audio nagging suppressed. Fusion sets it on every zone each tick; the HMI keys audio suppression off it.
